children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The rights and protections under this chapter shall, subject to paragraph (2), apply with respect to the conduct of each instrumentality of the Congress.

children.heading: Establishment of remedies and procedures by instrumentalities
children.label: 2 Establishment of remedies and procedures by instrumentalities
children.text: The chief official of each instrumentality of the Congress shall establish remedies and procedures to be utilized with respect to the rights and protections provided pursuant to paragraph (1).

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: 3 Report to Congress
children.text: The chief official of each instrumentality of the Congress shall, after establishing remedies and procedures for purposes of paragraph (2), submit to the Congress a report describing the remedies and procedures.

children.heading: Definition of instrumentalities
children.label: 4 Definition of instrumentalities
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “instrumentality of the Congress” means the following:, the Government Accountability Office, the Government Publishing Office, and the Library of Congress,.11So in original. The comma probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Enforcement of employment rights
children.label: 5 Enforcement of employment rights
children.text: The remedies and procedures set forth in shall be available to any employee of an instrumentality of the Congress who alleges a violation of the rights and protections under sections 12112 through 12114 of this title that are made applicable by this section, except that the authorities of the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission shall be exercised by the chief official of the instrumentality of the Congress.section 2000e–16 of this title

children.heading: Enforcement of rights to public services and accommodations
children.label: 6 Enforcement of rights to public services and accommodations
children.text: The remedies and procedures set forth in shall be available to any qualified person with a disability who is a visitor, guest, or patron of an instrumentality of Congress and who alleges a violation of the rights and protections under sections 12131 through 12150 of this title or section 12182 or 12183 of this title that are made applicable by this section, except that the authorities of the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission shall be exercised by the chief official of the instrumentality of the Congress.section 2000e–16 of this title

children.heading: Construction
children.label: 7 Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall alter the enforcement procedures for individuals with disabilities provided in the General Accounting Office Personnel Act of 1980 and regulations promulgated pursuant to that Act.
